description_long: This sculpture features an abstracted human figure with arms raised, holding a large spherical object above its head. The body is stylized with flowing, organic forms that spiral and curve, creating a sense of upward movement and dynamic energy. The lower portion of the sculpture consists of layered, undulating shapes that suggest a base or pedestal, seamlessly integrated into the figure's form. The surface appears to be made of a dark, weathered metal, possibly bronze, with a matte finish and subtle patina. The overall design is modern and expressive, blending figurative and abstract elements. The sculpture's substantial size and solid construction make it a striking focal point suitable for public urban spaces.
description: An abstract human figure with raised arms holds a large sphere aloft, rendered in dark, weathered metal with flowing, organic forms. The sculpture combines figurative and abstract elements, creating a dynamic and modern visual impact.
description_view_0: The front view shows the human figure clearly, with both arms extended upward to support the large sphere, and the layered, spiral base is prominent.
description_view_1: From the left side, the sculpture's curving, organic forms and the depth of the spiral base are visible, with the sphere appearing more elongated.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the back of the figure and the integration of the spiral base, with the sphere still visible above.
description_view_3: The right side view emphasizes the sculpture's flowing contours and the layered structure of the base, with the sphere seen in profile.
attribute_subject_matter: abstract human figure holding a sphere
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
